productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Black Maroon Purple Stripe Shirt
description: CompositionBlack full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has maroon, purple and grey bold stripes, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, appliqued brand name tab on top of left chest pocket, full length buttoned placket with tri-tone buttons, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and button on the elbow and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  navy blue and khakhi check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The tri-toned buttons add to the sense of style. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
